vibe: Premium Indian Real Estate & Interiors, Warm, Editorial, Spacious

headings.strategy: Large-scale editorial type. Clean, intentional restraint. Tracking-tight for massive headlines.

body.strategy: Highly legible, geometric sans to balance the ornate serif. Crisp and modern.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Wide gaps to let the property photography and typography breathe.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none for editorial luxury feel, or rounded-sm (2px) maximum for subtle softening.

buttons.primary: bg-[#06402B] text-[#FAF9F6] px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#042B1D] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#06402B] text-[#06402B] px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#06402B] hover:text-[#FAF9F6] transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#B68D40] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#947230] transition-colors

cards.property_card: bg-white border border-[#E8E4D9] rounded-none overflow-hidden group shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.amenity_card: bg-[#F3F0E9] p-6 border-l-2 border-[#B68D40] flex flex-col gap-4

forms.input: border-b border-[#D1CFC7] bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#06402B] transition-colors text-base
forms.label: text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-[#4A5D54] mb-1 block

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FAF9F6]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8E4D9] py-4
navigation.links: text-sm tracking-wide text-[#1A2421] hover:text-[#B68D40] transition-colors font-medium

motion.hover: Subtle scale (1.02) on property images, smooth color transitions for buttons.
motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Staggered fade-up for grid items.

media.rules: High-end architectural photography, warm lighting, luxurious interiors.

hero_exterior.category: Hero Background - Main Real Estate Page
hero_exterior.description: Premium luxury modern Indian apartment exterior with warm sunset lighting

hero_interior.category: Hero Background - Homesqre Interiors Landing Page
hero_interior.description: Warm, premium modern Indian living room with fluted panels

interior_kitchen.description: High-end modular kitchen interior in emerald and gold

floor_plan.description: Architectural 3D floor plan of a 3BHK luxury apartment

property_exterior_1.description: White concrete luxury building during daytime

interior_living_1.description: Modern living room with elegant furniture

interior_living_2.description: Modern living room wooden walls warm lighting

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

specific_instructions.dashboards: Dashboards should be data-dense but breathable. Use 1px borders, white backgrounds, and minimal shadows. Incorporate the Kanban pipeline with clear status color-coding as defined in 'dashboard_specific' colors.
specific_instructions.currency_format: Always format prices in INR with Indian numbering system (Lakhs, Cr). Example: ₹1.2 Cr, ₹85 Lakhs.
specific_instructions.map: Use Leaflet for map view. Style the map tiles to match the light, warm, beige aesthetic (desaturated or warm-toned map tiles if possible).
specific_instructions.interiors_landing: Should feel like a distinct premium brand (think Livspace/Houzz). Use large editorial type, heavy focus on the generated interior images, a bento grid for the design gallery, and crisp structured cards for the cost estimator.
specific_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn components for complex logic but heavily strip the 'Vercel-look'. Overwrite with flat borders, squared corners (rounded-none), and elegant typography.
